Current Operations

    Other Operations

  • Lethal Kinetic Strike, March 8, 2026 SOUTHCOM 08 Mar 2026 -- On March 8, at the direction of the Commander of U.S. Southern Command, Marine Gen. Francis L. Donovan, Joint Task Force Southern Spear conducted a lethal kinetic strike on a vessel operated by Designated Terrorist Organizations.

    • Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion | Operation True Promise 4

  • U.S. Forces Issue Safety Warning to Civilians in Iran CENTCOM 08 Mar 2026 -- U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) is issuing a safety warning to civilians in Iran, March 8, as Iran's terrorist regime blatantly disregards the safety of innocent people.

  • True Promise 4: Iran and resistance axis ops. against US-Israeli assets on Mar. 8 Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- Iranian armed forces and resistance groups across the region continue to carry out retaliatory military operations against the United States and the Israeli regime.
  • Iran Army warns Muslim neighbors: Deter barbaric US-Israeli attacks on Iran's energy infrastructure or face retaliation Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- A spokesman for the Iranian armed forces stated that the governments of regional Islamic countries are expected to deter the United States and the Israeli regime from conducting barbaric attacks on Iran's civilian energy infrastructure; otherwise, similar actions will be taken in the region.
  • Iran's Army says 104 killed, 32 injured in US strike on Frigate Dena Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Army says 104 personnel on board the Frigate Dena have lost their lives during a "savage" attack by the United States in international waters.
  • IRGC forces ready for USS Gerald Ford to reach 'designated perimeter': Cmdr. Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- The commander of the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) Aerospace Force has reacted to reports that a new US aircraft carrier is headed to the region, saying Iranian forces are monitoring the situation closely.
  • Iran destroys four advanced US THAAD radars, downs Israeli drone Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- The Iranian armed forces have destroyed four advanced American radar systems during reprisal attacks targeting the United States' anti-missile defense infrastructure in the region.
  • Iran: US-Israeli strikes on oil depots 'intentional chemical warfare' Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei says the US-Israeli attacks on fuel storage facilities amount to nothing less than "intentional chemical warfare" against the Iranian citizens.
  • IRGC says will expand 'scale and depth' of retaliatory attacks against US, Israel Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) carried out the 28th wave of True Promise 4 military operation, vowing that the scale and depth of retaliatory attacks against enemy targets will expand in the coming days.
  • Children make up 30% of fatalities of ongoing US-Israeli war on Iran: Health Ministry Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- The Iranian Health Ministry says children and minors make up at least one-third of the fatalities in the first week of the ongoing US-Israeli war of aggression against the country.
  • IRGC drone, missile strikes target US Al-Udairi helicopter base in Kuwait Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) says its navy forces carried out a combined drone and ballistic-missile operation against the US Al-Udairi helicopter base in Kuwait.
  • Iran strikes Israeli refinery after attacks on Iranian energy infrastructure People's Daily 08 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) said it attacked a refinery in Israel's Haifa on Saturday night in retaliation for a U.S.-Israeli strike on its own energy infrastructure.
  • IRGC missile attacks target US base in Kuwait, separatist positions Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) says the missile units of its ground forces have precisely hit the US terrorist base in Kuwait's Arifjan as well as separatist positions in Iran's northwestern areas.
  • Iran conducts missile strike on US base after attack on desalination facility Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- The spokesperson for Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters, Iran's highest operational command unit, says Iranian forces carried out a missile strike against a US military installation following an attack on a desalination facility in southern Islamic Republic.
  • IRGC announces 27th wave of Operation True Promise 4 targeting American, Israeli positions Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has announced carrying out the 27th wave of Operation True Promise 4, its ongoing set of retaliatory strikes against fresh unprovoked US-Israeli aggression towards the Islamic Republic.

  • Israeli army confirms attack on main military university in Tehran People's Daily 08 Mar 2026 -- The Israel Defense Forces (IDF) said on Saturday that it had carried out a new wave of strikes targeting Iranian infrastructure, including the main military university of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) in Tehran.

  • Trump Declines Statement On Supreme Leader, Says Only: 'We'll See What Happens' RFE/RL 08 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump declined to comment on the election of Mojtaba Khamenei as Iran's new supreme leader after previously saying the 56-year-old ayatollah was a "lightweight" and an "unacceptable" choice.
  • Debate Rages Among US Lawmakers On Iran War's Impact On Ukraine RFE/RL 08 Mar 2026 -- The US-Israeli military campaign against Iran has focused world attention on the Middle East.
  • Statement From Assistant Secretary Dylan Johnson on Successful Operations to Assist American Citizens in the Middle East US Dept. of State 08 Mar 2026 -- Since February 28, over 32,000 American citizens have safely returned to the United States from the Middle East.

  • Mojtaba Khamenei Follows In Father's Footsteps As Iran's New Supreme Leader RFE/RL 08 Mar 2026 -- The March 8 election of Mojtaba Khamenei as the new leader by Iran's Assembly of Experts following the killing of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in a US-Israeli attack marks the first time the son of a supreme leader is succeeding his father in the Islamic republic.
  • Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Khamenei elected new Leader of the Islamic Revolution Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Hosseini Khamenei has been elected the new Supreme Leader of the Islamic Revolution and the Islamic Republic of Iran.
  • Araghchi says Iran rejects calls for ceasefire, seeks 'permanent end' to war Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says Iran will reject any call for a ceasefire in the ongoing war with the United States and Israel, insisting that there must be a permanent end to the aggression.
  • Countries can avoid Iranian attacks only by blocking US-Israeli use of territory: Official Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- A senior Iranian official says countries in the region must block the use of their territory by the enemies of Iran if they want to remain safe from Iran's reprisal attacks.
  • Iran will continue war until enemies regret their aggression: Top commander Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- Commander of the Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters Major General Ali Abdollahi says Iran will keep the war on with the United States and Israeli regime until they regret launching the aggression against the Islamic Republic.
  • Iran exercising right to self-defense under international law: FM spox Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- Iran has reiterated its inalienable right to self-defense against the illegal US-Israeli aggression, slamming global silence on the crimes being committed by the aggressor regimes.
  • Qalibaf: Continuation of anti-Iran war will choke off oil sales, production in region Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- Parliament Speaker Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf says the continuation of the ongoing US-Israeli aggression against Iran will not only choke off any chances for the sales and production of crude oil, but will also set ablaze US interests as well as those of the West Asia region and the entire world.
  • President Pezeshkian: Iran has to respond to enemy attacks originating from any country Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- President Masoud Pezeshkian has reaffirmed Iran's legitimate right to respond to enemy attacks launched from any country.
  • Iranian Military Ready to Respond to US Ground Invasion - Foreign Minister Sputnik 08 Mar 2026 -- Iran will be ready to respond in the event of a ground invasion by the United States, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said on Sunday.
  • Cracks In Iranian Leadership? Apology, Then More Regional Attacks RFE/RL 08 Mar 2026 -- Iran could be moving closer to electing a new supreme leader even as some cracks appeared to be developing among the surviving rulers in Tehran, while the United States and Israel vowed to hit Iran harder than ever as the war passed the one-week mark.
  • President Pezeshkian's gesture to neighbors immediately killed by Trump: Iran FM Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has blasted Washington's reaction to President Masoud Pezeshkian's extension of the hand of friendship to neighbors, saying that the gesture was almost immediately killed by US President Donald Trump.
  • Retaliatory operations only target 'origin' of anti-Iran attacks: Envoy Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- Iran's ambassador and permanent representative to the United Nations has stated that the country's retaliatory operations only target the places from where the enemies launch their criminal attacks against the Islamic Republic.
  • US can't keep hiding truth about its captured forces: Iran's security chief Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- Iran's top security official says reports indicate that several American soldiers have been captured during the latest round of the United States' and the Israeli regime's unprovoked aggression towards the Islamic Republic that has prompted decisive Iranian retaliation.

  • Statement by PM Netanyahu Israel - Prime Minister 08 Mar 2026 -- "Standing before us is an extremist, evil regime that for 47 years has called for 'Death to Israel,' 'Death to America' and which plots to destroy us with atomic bombs and tens of thousands of ballistic missiles. (...) There was an additional danger here. There was the danger that Iran would preempt us, that Iran would strike first at American targets in the region as well as at Israel. For all these reasons, we acted at the appointed time."
  • Israeli Opposition Leader Yair Lapid Tells RFE/RL Iran's Oil 'Lifeline' Must Be Cut RFE/RL 08 Mar 2026 -- Yair Lapid, the leader of the opposition in Israel, says air strikes on Iranian oil fields --which have showered Tehran in black rain -- were needed to cut the "lifeline of the regime" in Iran.

  • Wang Yi on the Iran situation: Stop fighting, end the war, and restore peace to the Middle East and the rest of the world PRC MofA 08 Mar 2026 -- At the press conference on March 8, 2026, Member of the Political Bureau of the CPC Central Committee and Foreign Minister Wang Yi elaborated on China's position on the situation in Iran.
  • China calls for immediate ceasefire in Middle East: FM Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Mar 2026 -- China calls for an immediate stop to military operations in the Middle East to prevent further escalation and avoid the spillover of the conflict, Xinhua reports citing Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi.
  • 'Weapons are ominous tools, and should not be used without discretion,' Chinese Foreign Minister uses ancient Chinese saying to comment on US-Israel military operation against Iran Global Times 08 Mar 2026 -- Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi held a press conference on Sunday on the sidelines of the fourth session of the 14th National People's Congress.
  • Conflict in Middle East Should Never Have Started - Chinese Foreign Minister Sputnik 08 Mar 2026 -- The military conflict in the Middle East should never have started, it is not beneficial to either side, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said at a press conference on Sunday.
  • 'Wars are ominous instruments, not to be used without due cause,' Chinese Foreign Minister uses ancient Chinese saying to comment on US-Israel military operation against Iran Global Times 08 Mar 2026 -- Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi held a press conference on Sunday on the sidelines of the fourth session of the 14th National People's Congress.
  • China calls for immediate ceasefire in Middle East: FM People's Daily 08 Mar 2026 -- China calls for an immediate stop to military operations in the Middle East to prevent further escalation and avoid the spillover of the conflict, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said on Sunday.

  • Press release on Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov's telephone conversation with UAE Foreign Minister Abdullah bin Zayed Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 08 Mar 2026

  • Release from the Press Service of the President Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Mar 2026 -- On March 8, President of the Islamic Republic of Iran Masoud Pezeshkian made a phone call to President of the Republic of Azerbaijan Ilham Aliyev.
  • Release from the Press Service of the President Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Mar 2026 -- On March 8, President of the French Republic Emmanuel Macron made a phone call to President of the Republic of Azerbaijan Ilham Aliyev.
  • Türkiye continues diplomatic contacts to bring end to US-Israel-Iran war: Foreign minister Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Mar 2026 -- Türkiye continues to maintain diplomatic contacts to help bring an end to the war between the US, Israel and Iran, Anadolu Agency reports citing Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan.
  • HE GCCSG: The Nefarious Iranian Attacks Targeting Infrastructure in the Kingdom of Bahrain and the State of Kuwait are Dangerous Acts of Aggression Affirming Iran's Escalatory Approach and Threat to Regional Security and Stability Gulf Cooperation Council 08 Mar 2026
  • HE GCCSG Participates in the Extraordinary Ministerial Meeting of the Council of the League of Arab States to Discuss Treacherous Iranian Aggressions Gulf Cooperation Council 08 Mar 2026
  • HE GCCSG Condemns in the Strongest Terms the Grave Iranian Attack on a Residential Facility in Al Kharj, Saudi Arabia, Resulting in the Death and Injury of Innocent Civilians Gulf Cooperation Council 08 Mar 2026
  • Statements by the Government Spokesman of the Republic of Cyprus, 8 March 2026 Republic of Cyprus 08 Mar 2026 -- The President of the Republic of France, Mr Emmanuel Macron, and the Prime Minister of the Hellenic Republic, Mr Kyriakos Mitsotakis, will visit Cyprus, the Government Spokesman of the Republic of Cyprus, Mr Konstantinos Letymbiotis, confirmed today, 8 March 2026.
  • Minister of Foreign Affairs, African Cooperation, and Moroccan Expatriates, MFA Nasser Bourita affirmed on Sunday that His Majesty King Mohammed VI, may God assist him, has always considered that the safety and stability of Arab Gulf countries are inseparable from Morocco's own safety: "What hurts you hurts us, and what affects us affects you." Morocco Ministry of Foreign Affairs 08 Mar 2026

  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Attempted Attacks with Two Drones Thwarted North of Riyadh SPA 08 Mar 2026

  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Six Drones Intercepted and Destroyed East of Riyadh SPA 08 Mar 2026
  • HRH the Crown Prince, Ukrainian President Discuss Regional Military Escalation; Zelenskyy Condemns Iranian Attacks on Saudi Arabia SPA 08 Mar 2026 -- His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince and Prime Minister, received a phone call from Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, who expressed his country's condemnation of the blatant Iranian attacks against the Kingdom
  • HRH the Crown Prince Receives Phone Call from Spanish Prime Minister; Sánchez Condemns Iranian Attacks on Saudi Arabia SPA 08 Mar 2026 -- His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince and Prime Minister, received a phone call from Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez, who expressed his country's condemnation of the heinous Iranian attacks against the Kingdom
  • Brazilian President Postpones US Visit Due to Iran Conflict - Minister Sputnik 08 Mar 2026 -- Brazilian President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva has postponed his planned visit to Washington for the second half of March due to the Iranian conflict, Agriculture Minister Carlos Favaro announced.

  • Wladimir Van Wilgenburg: Kurdish Groups Need US 'Guarantees' Before Iran Offensive RFE/RL 08 Mar 2026 -- The United States is considering arming Iranian Kurdish opposition groups based in neighboring Iraq, according to reports, with the aim of fomenting an uprising inside the Islamic republic.

Defense Policy / Programs

  • Magic Bullet? Sci-Fi Laser Weapons Are Now An Anti-Drone Reality RFE/RL 08 Mar 2026 -- Shaky amateur footage showing rockets apparently disappearing in bursts of sparks over Lebanon were shared online on March 2, along with claims the videos showed the results of a futuristic Israeli air defense weapon in action amid the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.

  • China's Type 055 destroyers Hull 109, 110 make debut in official media report Global Times 08 Mar 2026 -- Two new Type 055 large destroyers of the Chinese People's Liberation Army (PLA) Navy, the Hull 109 Dongguan and the Hull 110 Anqing, made their official debut in an official media report on Sunday, taking the total number of the 10,000 ton-class warships to 10, up from eight. Chinese military affairs experts said that the destroyer is among the most powerful warship classes in China and the world, and more Type 055 vessels will strengthen the PLA Navy's long-range offensive and defensive capabilities, serving national defense as well as regional peace and stability.

  • Design contract signals decisive step in Henderson Defence Precinct consolidation Australia DOD 08 Mar 2026 -- The Albanese Government has taken the next step in establishing a consolidated defence precinct at Henderson to support sovereign shipbuilding and sustainment in Western Australia.

  • Prime Minister Carney convenes the Incident Response Group Prime Minister of Canada 08 Mar 2026 -- Today, the Prime Minister, Mark Carney, convened the Incident Response Group (IRG) with ministers and senior officials to discuss the ongoing hostilities in Iran and the Middle East, and continued vigilance to ensure the safety and security of all Canadians.

    Operation Iron Swords / Operation Al-Aqsa Flood | Operation Northern Arrows | Giddeon's Chariots

  • Statement by PM Netanyahu Israel - Prime Minister 08 Mar 2026 -- "Our heroic fighters set out last night on a special operation to locate and return home the navigator Ron Arad, who fell into captivity in Lebanon nearly 40 years ago.

  • Israel considers evacuating northern settlements as Hezbollah ramps up attacks Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- The Israeli regime has reportedly begun to concede to the tactical demands imposed by Hezbollah, considering the evacuation of illegal settlements along the border with Lebanon.

  • Hezbollah hits northern Israeli-occupied territories with barrage of drones, missiles Press TV 08 Mar 2026 -- The Lebanese resistance movement Hezbollah says it has struck several military bases and illegal settlements along the Lebanese border with the northern Israeli-occupied territories.

  • OIC Condemns Escalation of Settler Crimes in the West Bank Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) 08 Mar 2026 -- The General Secretariat of the Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) has condemned in the strongest terms the continuing crimes of murder, incitement, settlement expansion and organized terrorism perpetrated by gangs of extremist settlers under the protection of the Israeli occupation forces, which today resulted in the martyrdom of five Palestinian citizens and the injury of others in several villages in the occupied West Bank
  • Wang Yi: Turmoil and war need not be the fate of the Palestinian people PRC MofA 08 Mar 2026 -- At the press conference on March 8, 2026, Member of the Political Bureau of the CPC Central Committee and Foreign Minister Wang Yi spoke of the Palestinian question.
  • Prime Minister Carney speaks with Prime Minister of Lebanon Nawaf Salam Prime Minister of Canada 08 Mar 2026 -- Today, the Prime Minister, Mark Carney, spoke with the Prime Minister of Lebanon, Nawaf Salam.

    • Other Conflicts

  • Wang Yi: Peace, cooperation and friendship should be the new narrative of the South China Sea PRC MofA 08 Mar 2026
  • Increase in Chinese ships in WPS unrelated to Mideast conflict Philippine News Agency 08 Mar 2026 -- A ranking Philippine Navy official on Sunday said the United States' preoccupation in the conflict in the Middle East has nothing to do with the slight increase in Chinese ships monitored in the West Philippine Sea (WPS).

  • 27K ex-MILF, ABB fighters benefit from DSWD peace program Philippine News Agency 08 Mar 2026 -- A total of 27,589 former members of non-state armed groups (FMNSAGs) have benefitted from the Department of Social Welfare and Development's (DSWD) Peace and Development-Buong Bansa Mapayapa (PDBBM) as part of the ongoing government efforts to strengthen peacebuilding in conflict-affected communities.

  • Statement from UNICEF Country Representative, South Sudan on the reported killings in Abiemnhom, Ruweng Adminstrative Area UNICEF 08 Mar 2026 -- UNICEF strongly condemns the brutal attack in Abiemnhom County in the Ruweng Administrative Area of South Sudan, which resulted in the deaths of three children, while at least 13 others are receiving treatment in hospital. The assault occurred on March 1, 2026. Local authorities report that the death toll has risen to 180, with more than 4,000 people displaced.

  • WFP warns rising food and fuel prices risk pushing global hunger higher as humanitarian needs grow WFP 08 Mar 2026 -- The United Nations World Food Programme (WFP) is warning that surging food and fuel prices driven by the escalation of the conflict in the Middle East could have ripple effects that will worsen hunger for vulnerable populations in the region and beyond. The escalation has already had a devastating impact on civilians bearing the brunt of the violence through mass displacement, loss of life, and the destruction of essential infrastructure.

News Reports

  • Crew member arrested on suspicion of a serious crime Swedish Coast Guard 08 Mar 2026 -- The investigation into the vessel Caffa continues. Findings made have led to one person from the crew being arrested and taken ashore on suspicion of a serious crime. A prosecutor has taken over the preliminary investigation.

  • Trump announces new military coalition to combat cartels across Americas Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 08 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump on Saturday announced the creation of a new military coalition aimed at combating powerful criminal gangs and cartels across the Americas, saying the initiative is necessary to restore law and order in the Western Hemisphere, Anadolu Agency reports.

  • Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov's answer to a question from the Moscow. Kremlin. Putin television programme, Moscow, March 8, 2026 Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 08 Mar 2026

  • A community with a shared future for humanity like a beacon lights the way forward: Chinese FM responds to a GT question Global Times 08 Mar 2026 -- The truth and value of this vision of building a community with a shared future for humanity are sinking in with people around the world and it's like a beacon lighting the way forward for humanity, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said during the press conference on Sunday on the sidelines of the fourth session of the 14th National People's Congress. He answered questions from journalists from home and abroad on China's foreign policy and external relations, Xinhua News Agency reported.
  • Member of the Political Bureau of the CPC Central Committee and Foreign Minister Wang Yi Meets the Press PRC MofA 08 Mar 2026

  • Wang Yi: China-Africa friendship has stood the test of changing international circumstances and shown strong vitality PRC MofA 08 Mar 2026
  • Wang Yi: The choice of friends is a decision for LAC countries alone PRC MofA 08 Mar 2026
  • Wang Yi: For China-Europe relations, it is crucial for Europe to have a correct perception of China PRC MofA 08 Mar 2026

  • Wang Yi: Revitalize the U.N., defend the U.N. and make the U.N. stronger PRC MofA 08 Mar 2026
  • Wang Yi: China-Russia relationship has stood rock-solid against all odds PRC MofA 08 Mar 2026
  • Head-of-state diplomacy is the anchor of Chinese diplomacy: FM People's Daily 08 Mar 2026 -- Head-of-state diplomacy is the anchor of Chinese diplomacy, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said on Sunday.
  • Multipolar coexistence is what international landscape should be: Chinese FM Global Times 08 Mar 2026 -- Diversity is the inherent nature of human society, and multipolarity is what the international landscape should look like, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said on Sunday.
  • A China that has grown strong and its 1.4 billion people will never allow anyone to reverse verdict on aggression: Chinese FM Wang Yi on relations with Japan Global Times 08 Mar 2026 -- A China that has grown strong and its 1.4 billion people will never allow anyone to justify colonialism or reverse the verdict on aggression ever again,Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said at a press conference on Sunday on the sidelines of the fourth session of the 14th National People's Congress, responding a question regarding China's relations with Japan.
  • Chinese FM responds to how US-Israel joint military strikes against Iran could impact Trump's possible China visit Global Times 08 Mar 2026 -- China and the US are both major countries. Neither can change the other, but they can change the way they get along, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said at a press conference on Sunday on the sidelines of the fourth session of the 14th National People's Congress. He answered questions of journalists from home and abroad on China's foreign policy and external relations, Xinhua News Agency reported.
  • China does not subscribe to the logic of 'major-power co-governance,' Chinese FM answers question on 'China-US co-governance,' stresses multipolar coexistence Global Times 08 Mar 2026 -- China does not subscribe to the logic of "major-power co-governance," Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said at a press conference on Sunday on the sidelines of the fourth session of the 14th National People's Congress. He answered questions of journalists from home and abroad on China's foreign policy and external relations, the Xinhua News Agency reported.
  • China-Russia relations remain 'as steady as rock' despite test of winds, rains: Chinese FM Global Times 08 Mar 2026 -- China-Russia relations remain "as steady as rock" despite test of winds and rains, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said at a press conference on Sunday on the sidelines of the fourth session of the 14th National People's Congress. He answered questions of journalists from home and abroad on China's foreign policy and external relations, the Xinhua News Agency reported.
  • We welcome European friends to step out of 'attic' of protectionism, into 'gymnasium' of Chinese market: FM Global Times 08 Mar 2026 -- "We welcome our European friends to step out of the 'attic' of protectionism and step into the 'gymnasium' of the Chinese market, where they can strengthen themselves and enhance their competitiveness," Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said at a press conference on Sunday on the sidelines of the fourth session of the 14th National People's Congress. He answered questions from journalists from home and abroad on China's foreign policy and external relations, the Xinhua News Agency reported.
  • China-India mutual trust and cooperation benefit common development, while division and confrontation do not help Asia's rejuvenation: Chinese FM in response to Indian reporter's question Global Times 08 Mar 2026 -- China and India are important neighbors and both belong to the Global South, sharing deep cultural ties and extensive common interests, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said at a press conference on Sunday on the sidelines of the fourth session of the 14th National People's Congress of the People's Republic of China. He answered questions from journalists from home and abroad on China's foreign policy and external relations, Xinhua News Agency reported.
  • LAC countries should make their own decision in choosing friends: Chinese FM Global Times 08 Mar 2026 -- The path of Latin American and Caribbean (LAC) countries should be chosen by their people, and the choice of friends should be made by LAC countries themselves, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said Sunday.
  • Chinese FM responds to analyses that US is secretly undermining China's port operations and oil trade in Latin America Global Times 08 Mar 2026 -- The path of Latin American and Caribbean (LAC) countries should be chosen by their people, and the choice of friends should be made by LAC countries themselves, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said at a press conference on Sunday on the sidelines of the fourth session of the 14th National People's Congress.

  • Wang Yi: The more the international community stands against "Taiwan independence," the more assured peace and stability will be across the Taiwan Strait PRC MofA 08 Mar 2026 -- On March 8, 2026, Member of the Political Bureau of the CPC Central Committee and Foreign Minister Wang Yi stated China's position on the Taiwan question.
  • Chinese FM questions Japan: Taiwan affairs are China's internal affairs, by what right does Japan interfere? Global Times 08 Mar 2026 -- A China that has grown strong and its 1.4 billion people will never allow anyone to justify colonialism or reverse the verdict on aggression ever again,Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said at a press conference on Sunday on the sidelines of the fourth session of the 14th National People's Congress, responding a question regarding China's relations with Japan.
  • We will never allow any individual or force to separate Taiwan from China: FM on whether China has timetable and roadmap for national reunification Global Times 08 Mar 2026 -- China-Russia relations remain "as steady as rock" despite test of winds and rains, Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said at a press conference on Sunday on the sidelines of the fourth session of the 14th National People's Congress. He answered questions of journalists from home and abroad on China's foreign policy and external relations, the Xinhua News Agency reported.
  • No individual or force allowed to separate Taiwan from China: Chinese FM People's Daily 08 Mar 2026 -- Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi said Sunday that no individual or force will be allowed to separate Taiwan from China.

  • Enlarged Plenary Meetings of Party Committees of Ministries and National Agencies Held KCNA 08 Mar 2026 -- Enlarged plenary meetings of the Party committees of the Ministry of Railways, the Ministry of Land and Maritime Transport, the Pyongyang Construction Commission, the State Academy of Sciences, the Ministry of Culture and the Ministry of Physical Culture and Sports were held from March 4 to 6 to implement the decisions of the Ninth Congress of the Workers' Party of Korea and the First Plenary Meeting of the Ninth Central Committee of the WPK.

  • PM call with His Highness Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan, President of the United Arab Emirates: 8 March 2026 Gov.UK 08 Mar 2026
  • PM call with President Trump of the United States: 8 March 2026 Gov.UK 08 Mar 2026

  • Prime Minister Carney speaks with President of the United States Donald J. Trump Prime Minister of Canada 08 Mar 2026 -- The Prime Minister, Mark Carney, and the President of the United States, Donald J. Trump, held a conversation this afternoon on a range of issues, including the economy, developments in the Middle East, and trade relations between the two countries. They agreed to remain in close contact.
